name: Patient X
history: History of isolation and chronic depression since late adolescence. Past difficulties with friendships. Recent breakup preceding a relapse into a depressive episode. History of taking SSRIs and recent medication adjustments following the relapse.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't perform perfectly, I will be rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must be perfect to be accepted.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of social situations and reliance on isolation.
situation: Planned a weekend for sewing and catching up on work tasks. Was unable to focus on familiar tasks and spent the day watching television.
